subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-14 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: I have brought thee with me that I may educate thee according to my own standard. As soon as I observe that thou hast attained to that standard, I shall send thee away.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
